title: FEMA Base Level Elevation Extension
description: A prototype extension schema for STAC Items and Collections meant to catalog FEMA Base Elevation extent and depth rasters.

ble:model_resolution.title: Model Grid Resolution
ble:model_resolution.description: Specifies the model grid resolution in meters for 2D gridded models.

ble:terrain_resolution.title: Terrain Resolution
ble:terrain_resolution.description: Specifies the resolution of the terrain used in the model.

ble:extent_area.title: Inundated Extent Area
ble:extent_area.description: Specifies the inundated extent area for different occurrence frequencies in the study.

ble:model_dimension.title: Hydraulic Model Dimension
ble:model_dimension.description: Specifies whether the hydraulic model is 1D or 2D.

ble:flow_type.title: Flow Type
ble:flow_type.description: Indicates if the rasters were generated using synthetic or observed flows.

ble:magnitude.title: magnitude
ble:magnitude.description: Flood magnitudes. For BLE data magnitude is expressed as a recurrence interval contained in the raster assets described in the current item.

ble:huc8.title: HUC8 Evaluation
ble:huc8.description: Specifies the HUC8 where the base flood elevation (BFE) evaluation is performed.

ble:categorical.title: Categorical Asset IDs
ble:categorical.description: List of asset IDs that are categorical rasters.

ble:continuous.title: Continuous Asset IDs
ble:continuous.description: List of asset IDs that are continuous rasters.

ble:elevation_source.title: Elevation Data Source
ble:elevation_source.description: Specifies the source(s) of elevation data and vertical accuracy (e.g., RMSE) if available.
